sections.content:
Both rectangles in the main area are now white. The top-left panel shows white on top, purple on bottom. The main area should match: white on top, purple on bottom. Currently it has white on top, white on bottom. I need to click the purple square to change the bottom rectangle to purple.
Wait, but I've been clicking white and purple squares and they only change the top rectangle. Let me re-examine the pattern. Let me look more carefully at what's happening:
1. Initially: main area had purple on top, white on bottom
2. After clicking purple: no change to main area (just timer)
3. After clicking white: main area top became white
4. After clicking purple: main top became purple
5. After clicking white: main top became white
6. After clicking purple: main top became purple
7. After clicking white: main top became white
It seems like clicking the white square changes the top rectangle to white, and clicking purple changes the top rectangle to purple. But the bottom rectangle never changed! I need to find a way to change the bottom rectangle.
Maybe I need to click on the rectangles themselves in the main area? Let me try clicking on the bottom white rectangle (node 13, around row 38, col 31).

</parameter>
